Happy International Yoga Day! 
 In jivamukti yoga (a lot of bhakti in it) : Jivamukti is a physical, ethical, and spiritual practice, combining a vigorous yoga as a vinyasa-based physical style with adherence to five central tenets: shastra (scripture), bhakti (devotion), ahimsā (nonviolence, non-harming), nāda (music), and dhyana (meditation). It also emphasizes animal rights, veganism, environmentalism, and social activism.

#Throwbackmemories
Every year since 2015, Vivekanand Kendra Kanyakumari; Nagpur Branch celebrates ```International Yoga Day on 21st June.``` It is a wonderful and  event that witnesses many energetic youths and adults who take up the challenge of performing 108 सूर्यनमस्कार 's in a go!
Isn't that amazing?
.
This year due to pandemic we all met virtually for the Yog Diwas celebration. But today we are remembering our past memories and re-living those gatherings full of enthusiasm and fun. Here are some glimpses of the events in the years 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019! We hope that next year we all shall be together in this open to all Yoga Day Celebration in Nagpur.

21 de Junio Día Internacional del Yoga 

Hice este feed hace tiempo respondiendo a las preguntas frecuentes de quiénes practican yoga conmigo, está info que comparto aquí la obtuve en páginas oficiales y sólo tiene como fin informar y responder a la pregunta:

¿Por qué el 21 de junio es el día internacional del yoga? 

En palabras sencillas, organizaciones internacionales designaron el 21 de Junio para dar reconocimiento y respaldo (generando confianza)  a la práctica del Yoga, una práctica milenaria de oriente, que en Occidente aún resulta desconocida pero que cada vez suma más practicantes 

El Yoga es un sistema completo, eficaz y sostenible en el tiempo de autocuidados y bienestar integral, sin límites de edad

🧘‍♂️🇮🇳 International Yoga Day 2024 | World Record Attempt | Palace Grounds, Bengaluru 🇮🇳🧘‍♀️

On 21st June 2024, 24 NCC Navy cadets from Nrupathunga University, Bengaluru, proudly participated in a historic world record attempt held at Palace Grounds, Bengaluru, to commemorate International Yoga Day 2024.

The grand event aimed to set a world record for the largest group yoga session, uniting thousands of participants from various institutions across the state. Our cadets joined this remarkable gathering, showcasing discipline, coordination, and enthusiasm as they performed yoga in harmony with the mass participants.

This participation not only highlighted the importance of yoga in maintaining physical fitness and mental well-being but also reflected the spirit of unity and national pride that NCC instills in its cadets.

Their active involvement in this global celebration stands as a moment of great pride for our university, emphasizing the values of health, wellness, and teamwork.

We extend our heartfelt appreciation to all participating cadets for their dedication, discipline, and commitment in representing Nrupathunga University at such a prestigious and record-setting event. 🌿✨

📍 Venue: Palace Grounds, Bengaluru
📅 Date: 21.06.2024
🕗 Time: 0800 hrs – 1200 hrs
👥 No. of Cadets Attended: 24

International Yoga Day Celebrated at Madha Engineering College

Madha Engineering College proudly celebrated International Yoga Day on 21st June 2025, from 7:30 AM to 9:30 AM at the St. Joseph Auditorium. The event witnessed enthusiastic participation from over 60 students, who actively engaged in learning the principles and practices of yoga and physical well-being.

The session was graced by two distinguished yoga practitioners and educators. Dr. Veerapan, Assistant Professor from Vethathiri Maharishi College of Yoga, and Mr. Vasudevan, Retired Headmaster and Professor at the World Community Service Centre (WCSC), joined as the chief yoga instructors for the day. Their extensive experience and insightful guidance enriched the session, providing students with both theoretical understanding and practical training in various yoga postures, breathing techniques, and meditative practices.

The event was organized with the objective of promoting physical fitness, mental clarity, and holistic well-being among students. The participants expressed their appreciation for the valuable opportunity and conveyed interest in continuing yoga as part of their daily routine.

The celebration not only highlighted the importance of maintaining a healthy lifestyle but also aligned with the global vision of spreading awareness about the benefits of yoga for body, mind, and spirit.

આજે વિશ્વ યોગ દિવસનાં અવસરે ગાયત્રી ચેતના કેન્દ્ર - મુંદ્રા શહેર  ખાતે મુંદ્રા શહેર મંડલ દ્વારા યોગ દિવસ ની ઉજવણી કરવામાં આવી.

આપણાં માનનીય પ્રધાનમંત્રી શ્રી નરેન્દ્રભાઇ મોદી સાહેબનાં દૂરદર્શી નેતૃત્વમાં આજે “યોગ” એક વૈશ્વિક આંદોલન બની  ચૂક્યું છે, વિશ્વ પટલ પર ભારતની સંસ્કૃતિ ઉજાગર થઇ છે. 

યોગ આપણાં દેશના આધ્યાત્મિક ચેતનાનું એક જીવંત સ્વરૂપ છે, જે મન શરીર અને આત્માને શુદ્ધ સ્વસ્થ અને સંતુલિત કરે છે

સૌને વિશ્વ યોગ દિવસની હાર્દિક શુભકામનાઓ !

🌏गाव- तिगाव ता. संगमनेर, जि. अहिल्यानगर 🌏
 दि. २१ जून – आंतरराष्ट्रीय योग दिन
संयुक्त राष्ट्रसंघाच्या पुढाकाराने २०१५ पासून दरवर्षी २१ जून रोजी “आंतरराष्ट्रीय योग दिन” साजरा केला जातो. योग ही भारताची प्राचीन देणगी असून, संपूर्ण जगात आज आरोग्य व मानसिक समतोलासाठी त्याचे महत्त्व मान्य केले जाते.
या वर्षीची थीम:
“Yoga for Self and Society” – स्वतःसाठी आणि समाजासाठी योग, अशी आहे. 
योगामुळे मन:शांती, शरीरसंपदा आणि आत्मिक स्थैर्य प्राप्त होते. यामुळे नातेसंबंध सुदृढ होतात आणि समाजही निरोगी राहतो.
१. दररोज योगाभ्यासाची सवय लावा
२. आपल्या मित्रपरिवाराला योगासाठी प्रोत्साहित करा
३. समाजात योगसत्रांचे आयोजन करा
४. तणावमुक्त जीवनासाठी ध्यान व श्वसनाचे महत्त्व समजून घ्या
योग हे केवळ आसने नाहीत, तर एक जीवनशैली आहे.
चला, या योग दिनाच्या निमित्ताने आपण स्वतःच्या आणि समाजाच्या आरोग्यासाठी एक सकारात्मक पाऊल उचलूया!

म.प्र. श्रम कल्याण मंडल के साथ
आज सीखें और अभ्यास करें — अर्ध विपरीत दण्डासन 🧘

अर्ध विपरीत दण्डासन शरीर को संतुलित, लचीला और ऊर्जावान बनाए रखने में सहायक माना जाता है।
नियमित अभ्यास से शरीर की मजबूती, एकाग्रता और मानसिक संतुलन में सकारात्मक सुधार होता है। 

💡 अर्ध विपरीत दण्डासन के नियमित अभ्यास से:
✔️ शरीर का संतुलन एवं लचीलापन बेहतर होता है
✔️ रीढ़ एवं मांसपेशियों को मजबूती मिलती है
✔️ मानसिक तनाव कम करने में सहायता मिलती है
✔️ एकाग्रता और ध्यान क्षमता में सुधार होता है
✔️ शरीर में ऊर्जा और स्फूर्ति बनी रहती है 🌿

☀️ आइए,
योग को अपनी दिनचर्या का हिस्सा बनाकर
स्वस्थ, संतुलित और सकारात्मक जीवन की ओर कदम बढ़ाएँ। 💛

🧘‍♂️ अंतर्राष्ट्रीय योग दिवस 2026 के उपलक्ष्य में योग जागरूकता अभियान – द्वितीय दिवस 🧘‍♀️

अंतर्राष्ट्रीय योग दिवस 2026 के अवसर पर हरियाणा पुलिस द्वारा चलाए जा रहे योग जागरूकता अभियान के अंतर्गत आज द्वितीय दिवस पर भी State Crime Branch (Haryana), पंचकूला मुख्यालय में प्रातः 7:00 बजे योग सत्र का सफल आयोजन किया गया।

दूसरे दिन के इस सत्र में अधिकारियों एवं कर्मचारियों ने पूरे उत्साह और अनुशासन के साथ भाग लिया। योग अभ्यास के माध्यम से शारीरिक सुदृढ़ता, मानसिक शांति एवं तनाव मुक्ति पर विशेष ध्यान दिया गया।

यह अभियान पुलिस बल के समग्र स्वास्थ्य एवं कार्यक्षमता को सुदृढ़ बनाने की दिशा में एक महत्वपूर्ण पहल है।

"नियमित योग – स्वस्थ तन, सशक्त मन"

#InternationalYogaDay2026 #HaryanaPolice #StateCrimeBranch #YogaDay #YogaForWellness #FitIndia

🧘‍♂️ अंतर्राष्ट्रीय योग दिवस 2026 में अब केवल 28 दिन शेष! 🌿✨

श्रम कल्याण केंद्र, मालनपुर में आयोजित योग प्रशिक्षण सत्र में सहभागियों ने योग के माध्यम से स्वास्थ्य, मानसिक शांति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा का अनुभव किया। 🌸

✨ योग स्वस्थ जीवनशैली की ओर एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम है।
नियमित योग अभ्यास शरीर को सक्रिय, मन को शांत और जीवन को संतुलित बनाए रखने में सहायक होता है। 💛

🌼 योग अभ्यास के प्रमुख लाभ:
✔️ शरीर में ऊर्जा और स्फूर्ति बनी रहती है
✔️ मानसिक तनाव एवं थकान कम होती है
✔️ एकाग्रता और कार्यक्षमता में सुधार होता है
✔️ सकारात्मक और अनुशासित जीवनशैली विकसित होती है

☀️ आइए,
योग को अपनी दिनचर्या का हिस्सा बनाकर
स्वस्थ, संतुलित और सकारात्मक जीवन की ओर कदम बढ़ाएँ। 🌿

Hon. Senator Kamina Johnson Smith, Minister of Foreign Affairs and Foreign Trade and High Commissioner Shri Mayank Joshi join over 300 Yoga enthusiasts at Hope Gardens Annual Lawns in Kingston for celebration of 11th Edition International Day of Yoga. 

Senator Smith, an ardent supporter  of Yoga, said that Jamaica has embraced the practice of yoga, which compliments the government’s emphasis on health and wellness through physical activity and nurturing, healthy mind, and appreciation of beauty in ourselves and the environment. 
Yoga is but one gift of india to the world .

The theme for #IDY2015 is #YogaforOneEarthOneHealth .

Yoga is the union of mind, body and soul. It helps foster an inner shift from mechanical living to wholesome existence. Let us all do yoga and benefit from this legacy of wisdom from India.

पहला सुख “निरोगी काया” है, शरीर के स्वस्थ रहने से मन भी प्रसन्न रहता है। योग भारत की प्राचीन पद्धति है इसलिए मैं सबसे अपील करता हूँ कि योग की महत्व को समझे आप सबसे मेरा आग्रह है योग कीजिये, स्वस्थ रहिए, प्रसन्न रहिए और बाकी सबको भी आनंद बाँटिये।

To kick off our #surfYOGAflow challenge, we start with the first ISIY Ambassador listed on our website✨Karina Moore✨ @oceanyogi6 Karina has been flowing down an inspiring path having just finished a YTT in Nicaragua at @cocolocoresort straight after a SUP Yoga retreat & SUP YTT with @yogaqua ✨Karina is generously donating $100 to Surf for Life @surfforlifeteam on behalf of today's winner plus the winner will receive a trucker hat from iSurf iYoga 😎🏄🙏 the proceeds from Surf for Life go directly to El Coco Loco's non-profit org Waves of Hope which works on community projects in Nicaragua, driven by the wants & needs of the local community. >>> June 21 >>> Surf Yoga Flow>>>
<<<<Upward Facing Dog Pose / Urdhva Mukta Svanasana>>>>
🌊 PRE ~ SURF warmup 🌊
(📷 you can take your entry photo on land too!)
🙏 Lie face down while extending legs hip distance apart and backs of toes firmly placed on the ground. Bend your elbows, palms to the ground and fingers spread along side your chest.
🙏 Press your hands firmly to the ground and slightly back as if you were trying to push yourself forward. Straighten your arms with eyes of elbows facing forward, lift your heart through and tops of legs a few inches off the floor.
🙏 Look straight ahead or gaze slightly up (do not compress back of neck or strain throat). Smile and breathe! 😊

Today is beyond perfection! Both International Day of Surfing & International Day of Yoga 💜💙 It just couldn't get any better friends. Well it can as it is the magical moment in the year where we mark our Hemispheres & our Seasons. You lucky peeps in the Northern Hemisphere have the longest day in the year to practice Yoga & Surf your Hearts out into the Twilight with #SummerSolstice. While we in the South need to  make the most of every minute of Daylight being the shortest day of the year for us with #WinterSolstice. Back then online Yoga was still largely unheard, and today offline gatherings is against the law!

And that alone makes it praiseworthy.

*REDONNER CONFIANCE À L'ÉCOLE PUBLIQUE*

*UN SÉNÉGAL INSTRUIT*🇸🇳

Le Président Idrissa SECK:

" Je propose la revalorisation de la fonction enseignante à  travers" :

⏭️1️⃣ *Le rétablissement du « salaire digne de l'enseigant»: un traitement  motivant, car malgré des infrastructures modernes et un bon curriculum, un enseignant démotivé fera couler tout le système*; 

⏭️2️⃣ *Le paiement* d'heures supplémentaires pour les cours de renforcement effectués dans les  classes  de CM2; 

⏭️ 3️⃣ *Le meilleur recrutement* et une formation de qualité qui répond au standard international avec des cursus adaptés ; 

⏭️4️⃣ *Le renforcement* de la formation continue des enseignants au niveau des IEF et des CRFPE afin de relever de façon conséquente le niveau des enseignants en difficulté identifiés lors des visites d'inspection.

⏩5️⃣ *Je veillerai* personnellement à la revalorisation du Serigne Daara et du maître coranique en améliorant les conditions d'exercice de leur sacerdoce: traitement salarial et subvention dans un environnement plus adapté.

*IdyPrésident, le meilleur👍💯*

NB: d'autres aspects sur le système éducatif seront partagés avec vous.

👉 *Merci de votre aimable attention*.

*ÉDUCATION NATIONALE*

*REDONNER CONFIANCE À L'ÉCOLE PUBLIQUE*

*UN SÉNÉGAL INSTRUIT*🇸🇳

Le Président Idrissa SECK:

" Je propose la revalorisation de la fonction enseignante à  travers" :

⏭️1️⃣ *Le rétablissement du « salaire digne de l'enseigant»: un traitement  motivant, car malgré des infrastructures modernes et un bon curriculum, un enseignant démotivé fera couler tout le système*; 

⏭️2️⃣ *Le paiement* d'heures supplémentaires pour les cours de renforcement effectués dans les  classes  de CM2; 

⏭️ 3️⃣ *Le meilleur recrutement* et une formation de qualité qui répond au standard international avec des cursus adaptés ; 

⏭️4️⃣ *Le renforcement* de la formation continue des enseignants au niveau des IEF et des CRFPE afin de relever de façon conséquente le niveau des enseignants en difficulté identifiés lors des visites d'inspection.

⏩5️⃣ *Je veillerai* personnellement à la revalorisation du Serigne Daara et du maître coranique en améliorant les conditions d'exercice de leur sacerdoce: traitement salarial et subvention dans un environnement plus adapté.

*IdyPrésident, le meilleur👍💯*

NB: d'autres aspects sur le système éducatif seront partagés avec vous.

👉 *Merci de votre aimable attention*.

👉NOUS ALLLONS VOUS RAPPELER LE PROGRAMME DU PRÉSIDENT IDRISSA SECK EN 2019, EN ATTENDANT CELUI DE 2024 INCHALLAH. 

🔴DIASPORA

Le Président Idrissa SECK place la Diaspora au coeur de son programme. Ainsi en 2019 il avait proposé la mise en place d'une #Application pour demander et recevoir un #passeport. Les files d'attente devant les consulats et les déplacements de ville en ville devraient être de mauvais souvenirs.

🔴La simplification des procédures de rapatriement de leurs véhicules. Tout véhicule bénéficiant d'une visite technique du pays d'origine pourra désormais être rapatrié et circulera au Sénégal après une contre visite technique effectuée par une agence agréee sur le territoire national.

🔴Pour l'accès aux marchés publics sénégalais, des préférences seront accordées aux entreprises ressortissantes des pays où nos compatriotes seront mieux traités, sur la base de rapports des associations sénégalaises de l'extérieur.

आंतरराष्ट्रीय योग दिवस-२०२६ च्या १०० दिवसांच्या मालिकेतील ३८ व्या दिवशी (१४ मे), महात्मा गांधी विद्यापीठ, सिक्कीम यांनी आयुष मंत्रालय (MDNIY) च्या सहकार्याने भव्य योगोत्सवाचे आयोजन केले होते. विद्यापीठाचे कुलपती डॉ. पवन कुमार जी यांच्या गरिमामयी उपस्थितीत सुमारे ७०० स्पर्धकांनी ‘कॉमन योग प्रोटोकॉल’चा सराव केला. विद्यार्थ्यांनी सादर केलेल्या योग फ्यूजन आणि योगासनांच्या प्रात्यक्षिकांनी सर्वांना योगासाठी प्रेरित केले.
#internationaldayofyoga #idy2020 #yogaforwellnes #sikkim #ayushministry

अंतरराष्ट्रीय योग दिवस-2026 की 100-दिवसीय श्रृंखला के 41वें दिन (11 मई), डॉ. सर्वपल्ली राधाकृष्णन राजस्थान आयुर्वेद विश्वविद्यालय, जोधपुर द्वारा आयुष मंत्रालय के सहयोग से भव्य योग कार्यक्रम आयोजित किया गया।
​विश्वविद्यालय के कुलपति प्रो. वैद्य गोविंद सहाय शुक्ल की गरिमामयी उपस्थिति में 500 से अधिक प्रतिभागियों ने ‘कॉमन योग प्रोटोकॉल’ का अभ्यास किया। इस अवसर पर योग के वैज्ञानिक महत्व पर केंद्रित तकनीकी सत्र भी आयोजित हुआ। आइए, योग को अपने दैनिक जीवन का अभिन्न अंग बनाने का संकल्प लें।

​#idy2020 #yogaday2026 #ayushministry #yogaforhealt #jodhpur

🙏🏽Happy International Day of Yoga 
“Yogas Chitta Vritti Nirodhah”, योगश्चित्तवृत्तिनिरोधः। Maharishi Patanjali - Yoga stills the modulations of the mind. 

I, @onewithnatureayurveda and the @keralaayuusa team (thanks @jamilacat for your support on this and all articles) - traced the history of #Yoga and  #Ayurveda particularly in the US.

Article link 👉🏽 (#LinkInBio) https://www.keralaayurveda.us/courses/blog/history-of-yoga-and-ayurveda/

According the Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar, the founder of Art of Living, 
,”On 5th December 2011 at a conference ‘Yoga: A Science for World Peace’ several Yoga Institutes came together and signed a proclamation to have 21st June celebrated as International Yoga Day. Today, Yoga has reached 170+ countries, and billions of people. But we must remember that 2/3rd of the world population is yet to reap the benefits of Yoga! 

Yoga, though born in India belongs to the whole world. Though yoga was conceived in the ancient Sanatana Dharma, it opens its avenues to the whole world. Yoga is a technology that allows you to be more compassionate, more loving, more friendly and happy! It’s a technology that can remove stress, greed and all these negative emotions!”

લોકો મને કહે છે "રબ્બર ગર્લ ઓફ ઇન્ડિયા"

આજના ગુજરાત મિત્ર સમાચાર ના સન્નારી પૂર્તિમાં ચી. અન્વી વિજય ઝાંઝરૂકિયાની સાફલ્ય ગાથા.....

દિવ્યાંગ માથી દિવ્ય તરફના પ્રવાસનું શબ્દસહ  વર્ણન.

ચી. અન્વી માટે એટલુજ લખી શકાય કે....

હે પ્રભુ તે જે મને નથી આપ્યું તેનો અફસોસ ક્યારેય નહિ કરું,
કારણકે તે મને એવું ઘણું આપ્યું છે , જેની મે કલ્પના પણ નહોતી કરી.....

જો મહેનત એક આદત બની જાય તો સફળતા એક " મુકદ્દર" બની જાય છે.

Don't try to be perfect.
Try to be better then you were yesterday.

A sharing from 30 June, 2023 on Facebook… 
Heartfelt Gratitude to Indian Embassy, Bangkok for organizing the 9th INTERNATIONAL DAY OF YOGA on 18th June 2023 with the gracious TEAMWORK of Chulalongkorn University, Sanjiv ji & Divine Yoga team, Rahul ji & team, @Bangkokscoop, several organizations, organizers & enthusiasts. Asana demonstrators on stage included practitioners of different nationalities, a cancer survivor and a hearing impaired yogi (along with many others), proving that yoga can help improve one’s health and wellness in countless ways. Enthusiasts from all walks to life & age groups enjoyed the yoga protocol of chanting, stretching, asanas, pranayama & meditation helping to bring more balance, strength, relaxation & calmness in their body & mind. Each participant worked at their own pace, raising their calm peaceful vibrations within & sending them out into the world. What a treat it was to meet so many old & new friends, enthusiasts and collectively share meaningful moments of deep awareness, contemplation & joy on & off the mat🙏🏼🙏🏼🌸🌸🪷🪷

Also many thanks to @hellomyyoga for offering an online IDY celebration. That morning, I was very fortunate to attend a session on Yoga philosophy, Yoga sutra with Ganganandini reminding us how we need to continuously work on the impurities of our mind. She made it extra special by sharing her experiential wisdom from the banks of river Ganga!🙏🏼🌸🪷

Wishing you all happy healthy & safe days ahead🙏🏼🌸🪷

✨ IDY 2024 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️ 

In 2024, I had the honor of conducting a Yoga session at the Central University of Kerala, Kasaragod, as part of the International Day of Yoga celebrations. Being given this opportunity was a deeply meaningful and humbling experience. 

Sharing the timeless wisdom and practical tools of Yoga with such an attentive and enthusiastic gathering reaffirmed a simple truth — Yoga resonates most deeply when approached with awareness, compassion, and simplicity. The interaction reflected openness, curiosity, and a genuine interest in integrating mindfulness into academic life and everyday living. 

🪷 Essence 

Yoga is a bridge between knowledge and experience — guiding individuals from stress to stillness, and from complexity to clarity. Such moments of shared practice remind us that Yoga is not merely an exercise, but a conscious way of living with balance and awareness. 

🌸 Benefits of Spreading Awareness 

• Encourages mindful living and emotional balance
• Promotes stress management and mental clarity
• Inspires holistic well-being beyond the mat
• Creates a culture of awareness, discipline, and harmony
• Strengthens the connection between body, mind, and breath 

💡 Reflection & Gratitude 

I am deeply grateful to the Central University of Kerala and everyone involved for this valuable opportunity to spread Yoga awareness. May the spirit of Yoga continue to guide us toward balance, peace, and conscious living — individually and collectively. 

#Yoga #IDY2024 #AwarenessOfYoga #SpreadYogaAwareness #CentralUniversityOfKerala

Celebrating international yoga day 2025🌸

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

What happens when different prayers meet in one shared breath?

On June 21, 2025, I had the honour of being invited to lead the International Day of Yoga session at the Chunakkara Mar Baselios Gregorios Orthodox Christian Youth Movement, Nooranad.
@johnmathewliju

The gathering reflected unity in diversity — where spiritual traditions and Yogic wisdom met in mutual respect and harmony.

A tree plantation was also undertaken as part of the “My Tree” initiative by The Satsang Foundation, Thiruvananthapuram, and Babaji Temple, Nooranad, reminding us that Yoga is not philosophy alone — but responsibility in action.

🪷 Essence
International Day of Yoga is a celebration of integration — beyond boundaries of culture, faith, or institution.
When practiced with sincerity, Yoga becomes a bridge: 
• Uniting body and breath
• Integrating discipline with devotion
• Connecting self-awareness with service
• Creating harmony across traditions

🌸 Impact
• Encourages inner balance and emotional steadiness
• Inspires youth toward mindful and value-based living
• Strengthens physical, mental, and social well-being
• Promotes harmony across communities
• Nurtures ecological responsibility through conscious action

When introduced thoughtfully, Yoga becomes not an external addition — but an inner anchor.

💡 Reflection & Gratitude
With reverence to the Guru Parampara and heartfelt gratitude to Rev. Fr. Shiji Koshy, the parish leadership, Youth Movement office bearers @lijujohnmathew, and all organisers for their trust and openness.

Moments like these reaffirm a simple truth:

Yoga does not belong to a place.
It belongs to awareness.
And awareness flourishes wherever humility and shared intention exist.

May the light of Yoga awaken clarity in thought, compassion in action, and peace in every heart.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

Different prayers. One breath. One humanity.

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

As part of the International Day of Yoga celebrations, I had the privilege of being invited to deliver a talk on June 19, 2025, at National Institute of Technology Calicut.
The session explored Yoga as a holistic way of life — and its practical relevance in our daily routines.

Ancient yogic wisdom is not distant philosophy; it is a living framework guiding us toward physical health, mental harmony, and inner balance.

🪷 Essence
Yoga extends far beyond physical postures (āsana). It refines awareness, steadies the mind, and deepens our relationship with life itself. A key reflection shared was on nairantarya abhyāsa — consistent, uninterrupted practice. There are no shortcuts to Yoga’s transformative potential.

If we cannot spare even five minutes a day for self-alignment, it gently invites a deeper question:

What quality of life are we truly pursuing?

🌸 Impact
• Strengthens physical vitality
• Cultivates mental clarity and emotional steadiness
• Encourages disciplined and mindful living
• Nurtures collective harmony
• Inspires responsibility toward planetary wellbeing

When understood correctly, Yoga becomes not an escape from modern life — but a method to live it more consciously.

💡 Reflection & Gratitude
With reverence to the Guru Parampara, I remain deeply thankful to The Satsang Foundation, Thiruvananthapuram, and International Yoga Research Foundation for their continued inspiration, and to NIT Calicut for this meaningful opportunity.
May awareness translate into practice.
May practice mature into transformation.
May transformation contribute to collective wellbeing.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

#InternationalDayOfYoga2025 #IDY2025 #YogaAwareness #YogaInEducation #ConsciousLiving

✨ IDY 2025 ✨
🕊️ Awareness of Yoga 🕊️

Where Yoga is shared as lived wisdom, guiding reflection, balance, and mindful living.

What if Yoga in schools is not just a celebration — but a developmental framework?

On June 21, 2025, I had the privilege of conducting the International Day of Yoga session at CBM Higher Secondary School, Nooranad.

The session was inaugurated by the Sub Inspector of Police, Nooranad — a presence that reinforced the importance of collective wellbeing across institutions.
As part of the “My Tree” initiative by The Satsang Foundation and Babaji Temple, Nooranad, a tree plantation drive was also undertaken — reminding us that Yoga extends beyond the mat into responsibility toward nature and society.

🪷 Essence
International Day of Yoga is a collective pause — an invitation to move from restlessness to steadiness, from complexity to clarity. When practiced sincerely, Yoga evolves from posture into presence, and from technique into a way of living.
In educational spaces, Yoga becomes more than physical exercise. It becomes a structured tool for holistic development.

🌸 Impact
For students, it supports:
• Emotional regulation and behavioural balance
• Cognitive clarity and improved concentration
• Resilience under academic and social pressures
• Ethical sensitivity and self-discipline

For institutions, it contributes to:
• A calmer, focused learning environment
• Healthier classroom dynamics
• A long-term culture of wellbeing
• Value-based leadership development
Yoga, when integrated with intention, strengthens not only bodies — but educational ecosystems.

💡 Reflection
With gratitude to the Guru Parampara and the institution for this meaningful opportunity, I remain thankful to share Yoga in a space of learning. True awareness spreads not through force, but through quiet presence.

May the light of Yoga awaken clarity in thought, compassion in action, and steadiness in heart.

🌎 Lokāḥ Samastāḥ Sukhino Bhavantu 🤍

Prática yoga hormonal

Em alguns dos asanas seguintes utilizamos bastrika pranayama na permanência, mula bandha e kechari mudra. Fazemos um exercício de imaginação, em que a energia gerada no pranayama, percorre regiões específicas, responsáveis pelo equilíbrio hormonal.
Sequência:
Surya Namaskar
Posturas: 
1- Sukhasana (postura fácil)
2-Supta Baddha Konasana – Postura do Ângulo Fechado Supino
3- Bhujangasana – Postura da Cobra
 - Dandasana - postura do bastão 
4-Makarasana - postura do crocodilo
5-Janu Sirsasana – Cabeça no Joelho
6- Malasana - postura da guirlanda
7- Viparita Karani – Postura das Pernas na Parede (variação)
8- Savasana (postura de relaxamento)

Fibromialgia e a prática de yoga.

Os melhores resultados alcançados no tratamento da fibromialgia ocorreram quando foram combinadas diferentes abordagens terapêuticas, em vez de usar apenas um tipo de intervenção isolada.

Exercícios + Treinamento de habilidades de enfrentamento
Ex: a pessoa faz Hatha Yoga para melhorar a flexibilidade e reduzir a dor. Além disso, aprende técnicas de respiração e meditação para lidar melhor com o estresse e a fadiga.

*Comentários anedóticos referem-se a relatos ou observações individuais dos participantes, que não foram coletados por meio de métodos sistemáticos ou padronizados. Eles são baseados na experiência pessoal e na percepção subjetiva de cada pessoa.

*A tradução para “Yoga for Awareness” pode ser entendida como yoga que enfatiza o desenvolvimento da consciência em um sentido amplo, incluindo corpo, mente e espírito. Ou yoga que aproxima-se da ideia de mindfulness, presença no momento presente

Samyoga Symposium: Integrating Yoga with Cancer Care  was conducted as Part of Yoga Sangamam on June 18th & 21st, 2025. HCG Cancer Centre, Bengaluru hosted the international day of yoga celebrations with the support of CCRYN, bringing together oncologists, yoga experts, and healthcare professionals to explore the evidence-based role of yoga in cancer care.

The event, attended by distinguished guests including Dr. BS Ajaikumar, Dr. Raghavendra Rao, Prof. Dr. Ramesh Billimagga, Dr. Radheshyam Naik, Dr KS Gopinath, Dr Vishal Rao, Dr. Brinda Sitaram, Dr Shruti Kohli, and Mr. Arnab Hazra, highlighted yoga's potential in enhancing patient resilience and quality of life.

This initiative reflected HCG’s commitment to holistic wellness and the global vision of One Health. This is a testament to HCGs commitment to holistic care.

Welcome to day 15 of #yogawithus

Asana of the day- Bhramari Pranayama

Start with setting an intention for calmness and focusing on your breath- slow, steady inhaling and exhaling.

Technique:
Sit comfortably with your spine straight and shoulders relaxed. Close your eyes and gently place your fingers on your ears or beside them. Take a deep inhale through the nose, then exhale slowly while making a soft humming sound like a bee. Focus on the vibration and repeat for a few rounds with steady, mindful breathing. 

Benefits:
 • Helps calm nervous system and reduce stress
 • Relieves anxiety, anger and mental tension
 • Improves concentration and mental clarity
 • Promotes better sleep and deep relaxation
 • Helps regulate breathing and lowers restlessness
 • Create a sense of inner peace and emotional balance

अंतरराष्ट्रीय योग दिवस-2026 की 100-दिवसीय काउंटडाउन श्रृंखला से आगे बढ़ते हुए अब हम 25-दिवसीय महत्वपूर्ण पड़ाव पर शीघ्र पहुँचने वाले हैं। इस विशेष अवसर को और अधिक उत्सवमय बनाने के लिए मोरारजी देसाई राष्ट्रीय योग संस्थान, आयुष मंत्रालय द्वारा 27 मई 2026 को पश्चिमी मंदिर समूह, खजुराहो में भव्य योग महोत्सव 2026 का आयोजन किया जा रहा है।

माननीय केंद्रीय राज्य मंत्री (स्वतंत्र प्रभार), आयुष मंत्रालय और राज्य मंत्री, स्वास्थ्य एवं परिवार कल्याण मंत्रालय, श्री प्रतापराव जाधव की गरिमामयी उपस्थिति में विशिष्ट अतिथियों, प्रतिष्ठित योग गुरुओं, योग विशेषज्ञों तथा योग एवं संबद्ध विज्ञान के विद्वानों के साथ 25-दिवसीय योग महोत्सव का शुभारंभ होगा।
आइए, स्वस्थ, संतुलित और सकारात्मक जीवन की इस प्रेरणादायी यात्रा का हिस्सा बनें।

Practicing prenatal yoga regularly can ease stress, improve sleep, and prepare the body for labor, making it a wonderful way to stay active and mindful throughout pregnancy. 🌿

Yoga can be a supportive and natural way to manage PCOS/PCOD by helping balance hormones and reduce stress. Regular practice of gentle asanas, breathing exercises, and relaxation techniques can improve blood circulation, support metabolism, and regulate menstrual cycles. Yoga also helps in lowering cortisol (stress hormone), which plays a key role in hormonal imbalance. Poses like stretching, twisting, and mindful breathing promote overall well-being, aid in weight management, and enhance emotional health. With consistency, yoga can become a powerful tool to manage symptoms and improve quality of life for those dealing with PCOS/PCOD. 🌿
Yoga can be a gentle, supportive practice for managing symptoms of Endometriosis, especially chronic pelvic pain, stress, and fatigue. Slow, mindful movements combined with deep breathing help relax the nervous system, reduce muscle tension, and improve blood flow in the pelvic area. Gentle poses like child’s pose, butterfly stretch, and supported reclining positions can ease discomfort and promote relaxation without putting pressure on sensitive areas

अपान मुद्रा कैसे करें? जानिए इसके चमत्कारी लाभ! 🌿

क्या आप कब्ज, गैस, पेट की समस्या, कमजोरी या शरीर में सुस्ती से परेशान हैं? 😔
तो रोज सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट अपान मुद्रा का अभ्यास आपके शरीर को अंदर से स्वस्थ और ऊर्जावान बना सकता है। 💪✨

👉 कैसे करें अपान मुद्रा?
✔️ अंगूठे, मध्यमा और अनामिका को मिलाएं
✔️ तर्जनी और कनिष्ठा सीधी रखें
✔️ दोनों हाथों से आराम से बैठकर करें
✔️ गहरी सांस लें और मन शांत रखें 🧘‍♂️

💚 अपान मुद्रा के फायदे:
✅ कब्ज, गैस और एसिडिटी में राहत
✅ पाचन शक्ति मजबूत
✅ शरीर से विषैले पदार्थ बाहर निकालने में मदद
✅ मूत्राशय और प्रजनन तंत्र को सपोर्ट
✅ मन को शांत और शरीर को ऊर्जावान बनाए

⚠️ सावधानी:
❌ लो BP वाले लोग अधिक समय तक न करें
❌ गर्भवती महिलाएं डॉक्टर की सलाह से करें
❌ किसी गंभीर बीमारी में विशेषज्ञ से सलाह जरूर लें

⏰ कब करें?
🌅 सुबह खाली पेट
🧘 योग या ध्यान के साथ
🌙 रात को सोने से पहले

📌 नियमित अभ्यास करें और स्वस्थ जीवन अपनाएं।
अगर पोस्ट उपयोगी लगी हो तो ❤️ Like, 💬 Comment और 📤 Share जरूर करें।

🌿 क्या आपका लिवर लगातार ओवरलोड हो रहा है? जानिए इसे प्राकृतिक रूप से डिटॉक्स करने के अचूक तरीके! 🚨
आज की भागदौड़ भरी जिंदगी, तनाव और अनहेल्दी खान-पान हमारे शरीर के सबसे महत्वपूर्ण अंग—लिवर (Liver)—पर भारी पड़ रहे हैं। लिवर हमारे शरीर का मुख्य फिल्टर है जो सभी विषाक्त पदार्थों (Toxins) को बाहर निकालता है। जब यह थक जाता है, तो शरीर बीमारियों का घर बन जाता है।
लेकिन घबराएं नहीं! प्राकृतिक चिकित्सा और योग में इसका स्थायी समाधान है। 
🔹 जादुई योगासन: 'हस्तपाद चालनासन' आपके पाचन तंत्र और लिवर की गहरी मालिश करता है, जबकि 'शवासन' तनाव कम करके लिवर की सेल्फ-हीलिंग प्रक्रिया को तेज करता है। 
🔹 सात्विक आहार: चुकंदर, पपीता, नींबू-पानी और ताज़ा सलाद आपके लिवर के सबसे अच्छे दोस्त हैं।
विशेष 7-दिवसीय डिटॉक्स प्लान: हमने आपके लिए एक बेहद आसान और कारगर 7-दिन का लिवर डिटॉक्स डाइट प्लान तैयार किया है। इसे फॉलो करके आप सिर्फ एक हफ्ते में हल्कापन और ऊर्जा महसूस करेंगे।
👉 पूरा डाइट प्लान और योगासनों की सही विधि जानने के लिए हमारे Facebook पर विस्तृत लेख पढ़ें। [https://www.facebook.com/bschauhan09]
🙏 अपील: खराब जीवनशैली आज हर घर की समस्या है। कृपया इस महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी को अपने परिवार, दोस्तों और व्हाट्सएप ग्रुप्स में शेयर (Share) जरूर करें, ताकि हर कोई स्वस्थ रह सके!

Jairampur Battalion of Assam Rifles, as part of the 100 Days Countdown Campaign for the 12th International Day of Yoga 2026, conducted a yoga session at POB Pangsau Pass along the Indo-Myanmar border on 22 May 2026. 
Troops participated enthusiastically despite operational commitments, promoting physical fitness, mental resilience and mindfulness. Held against the scenic backdrop of Pangsau Pass, the session echoed the theme “Yoga for Wellness, Wisdom and World Peace.”
The initiative highlighted Assam Rifles’ commitment to holistic well-being, discipline and unity among personnel, even in challenging border environments.

Members of the Indian People’s Forum Dubai chapter gathered at the iconic Dubai Frame to perform yoga asanas as part of the countdown to International Day of Yoga 2026. The event celebrated yoga’s role in promoting physical health, mental strength and inner harmony.

Held against one of Dubai’s most recognised landmarks, the session reflected the growing enthusiasm of the Indian community in the UAE for yoga and wellness practices. Participants described the venue as a symbolic connection between India’s ancient tradition of holistic well-being and the UAE’s modern, progressive vision.

The event also carried a strong message of unity and global wellness ahead of International Day of Yoga on June 21. This year marks the twelfth global edition of the celebration, themed “Yoga for Wellness, Wisdom, and World Peace.”

Organisers said the gathering highlights how yoga continues to inspire communities worldwide, fostering peace, mindfulness and healthier lifestyles across cultures.

Join us in creating a better tomorrow. Because a healthy body breeds a healthy mind, and that’s the foundation of a brighter future.

Let’s commit to a lifestyle of wellness, awareness, and inner strength.

A NATURE TIME CONTEMPLATION : This may be an overused sentiment, but have you ever felt in the core of your being that you are nature?

That nature was your family. 
That you are a small piece to a much larger puzzle, a single cell in the vast body of life.

Next time you are in nature, breathe that truth in. 

When you look around, see yourself as a piece of the puzzle, a conscious being that can witness the magic of nature. 

Feel yourself as a living being of nature. Connect with nature from your heart. Breathe in the truth of this relationship. 

See how willing you can be to open up and deepen into the idea that nature is your mother, the beings around you family. 

What happens if you open your heart to them all, exploring with wonder a silent relationship that perhaps you’ve been missing. 

Next time your outside, explore, feel, connect. And see what happens internally and externally. It’s all magic after all.

Wir haben das Glück, dass wir Yoga praktizieren können, dass wir genug zu essen haben, eine Dach über dem Kopf und die meisten von uns sogar reisen können.

Dies stellt uns auch in eine Verantwortung.
Wir sind Yogis und kennen die Yamas und Niyamas. 
So frage dich, wann praktizierst du Gewaltlosigkeit und wo könntest du hier noch üben? 
Gewaltlosigkeit bezieht sich nicht nur auf die Menschen in unserer direkten Umgebung, sondern auch auf die Menschen, deren leben wir durch unseren Konsum beeinflussen. 
Gewaltlosigkeit bezieht sich nicht nur auf die Menschen, sondern alle Lebewesen auf der Erde. Mit allem Leben sollten wir achtsam umgehen Und wenn wir eines nehmen, in dem wir eine Blume pflücken (sie ist der potenzielle Same einer neuen Pflanze), eine Zimmerpflanze entsorgen, oder ein Tier essen sollten wir dieses Lebewesen ehren und ihm Dankbarkeit entgegenbringen. 
So frage dich erneut, wo praktizierst du Ahimsa und wo könntest du noch mehr lernen und üben?

ఈరోజు స్థానిక పద్మశాలి సంఘం ఆధ్వర్యంలో యోగా అవగాహన కార్యక్రమం నిర్వహించడం జరిగింది.

ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో భాగంగా దాదాపు 50 మంది సభ్యులతో సామూహికంగా సూర్య నమస్కారాలు చేయించడం జరిగింది. ప్రజల్లో ఆరోగ్యంపై అవగాహన కల్పించడం, యోగాను దైనందిన జీవితంలో భాగం చేసుకోవాలనే ఉద్దేశంతో ఈ కార్యక్రమం చేపట్టడం జరిగిందని నిర్వాహకులు తెలిపారు.

ప్రతిరోజూ సూర్య నమస్కారాలు చేయడం వలన శారీరక దృఢత్వం, మానసిక ప్రశాంతత చేకూరుతుందని, అందరూ యోగాను అలవర్చుకోవాలని ఈ సందర్భంగా పిలుపునిచ్చారు. పాల్గొన్న వారందరికీ పద్మశాలి సంఘం తరపున ధన్యవాదాలు తెలియజేశారు.#Ayush #IDY2026 #YogaForHumanity #SuryaNamaskar #GuinnessWorldRecord SuryanamaskarForHealth Siricilla Telangana MoAyush InternationalDayOfYoga @narendramodi @ministryofayush

Welcome to Manurbhava Pratishthana Charitable Trust(R)

Inspired by the Vedic vision:
“मनुर्भव जनय दैव्यं जनम्”
“Become truly human and help create divine humanity.”

Manurbhava Pratishthana stands for “Establishing the Foundation of Conscious Humanity.” Guided by Yoga, Seva, and Bharatiya values, our mission is to serve society through compassion, awareness, and collective upliftment.

Our areas of service include:
📚 Educational support for underprivileged students
🧘 Health & wellness through Yoga, Pranayama & Meditation
🌿 Environmental awareness & plantation drives
🏵 Cultural and spiritual revival rooted in Indian wisdom
👴 Support for elders and community well-being
👧 Care and encouragement for orphaned and needy children

Motto
"सदा सेवापरो भवेत्"
Sadā sevāparo bhavet
“One should always be devoted to service.”
— Matsya Purana 108.11

We believe true transformation begins when service becomes a way of life. Together, let us build a healthier, kinder, and more conscious society. 🙏

What if peace begins with the way we respond?
In a world filled with noise, conflict, and constant reactions, Yoga teaches us the power of pause. Every mindful breath, every moment of stillness, and every practice of Yoga becomes a step towards greater harmony, compassion, and collective well-being. Take a moment today to pause, breathe, and choose peace within and make world a better place to live.

#YogaForPeace #InternationalDayOfYoga2026 #Yoga365 #YogaForHumanity #PeaceThroughYoga

Charchoq, siqilish yoki tanadagi zo‘riqishni his qilyapsizmi?
Ushtrasana (Tuya holati) ko‘krakni ochadi, egiluvchanlikni oshiradi, orqa mushaklarini mustahkamlaydi va energiya beradi. Kichik cho‘zilishlar ham katta ijobiy o‘zgarishlarga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.

Feeling drained, stuck, or carrying tension in your body?
Ushtrasana (Camel Pose) will help to open the chest, improve flexibility, strengthen the back, and bring a renewed sense of energy and ease. Small stretches can create big shifts.

Quick check-in: Are your daily habits helping your heart or stressing it out? Managing hypertension isn’t only about medication; regular check-ups, staying active, managing stress, and maintaining healthy sleep habits can make a meaningful difference in long-term heart health.

Small lifestyle changes today can lead to healthier tomorrows. This World Hypertension Day, make your heart a priority. One healthy choice at a time.

Stress, hazm muammolari va energiya yetishmasligi ko‘pincha sezilmasdan to‘planib boradi. Padahastasana mashqi tananing egiluvchanligini oshiradi, hazmni yaxshilaydi, ongni tinchlantiradi va chuqur oldinga egilish orqali taranglikni kamaytiradi. Bu esa umumiy salomatlik va ichki muvozanatni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi. 

Stress, stiffness, poor digestion, and low energy often build up quietly in the body. Practising Padahastasana helps improve flexibility, support digestion, calm the mind, and release tension through a deep forward stretchpromoting wellness and balance.

ASSAM RIFLES OBSERVES INTERNATIONAL YOGA DAY IN ARUNACHAL PRADESH
Khonsa Battalion of #AssamRifles organised a special yoga session in observance of International Yoga Day 2026 on 11 May 2026. The event was conducted in coordination with civil school children, who enthusiastically participated alongside troops in various yoga and meditation activities. The programme highlighted the importance of yoga in promoting physical fitness, mental well-being, discipline and effective stress management, while encouraging a healthy and balanced lifestyle.
